title: Unglued
author: Lysa TerKeurst
subline: Making wise choices in the midst of raw emotions.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A jagged RED crack splits the entire cover in half diagonally, from upper-left to lower-right. The title sits on the LEFT of the crack (intact), the right side is the 'shattered' version of the same title. -->
  <g transform="translate(0 0)" fill="none">
    <!-- The crack: a jagged path from top to bottom -->
    <path d="M 700 0 L 720 200 L 680 400 L 740 600 L 700 800 L 760 1000 L 720 1200 L 780 1400 L 740 1600 L 800 1800 L 760 2000 L 800 2400" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="miter" stroke-linecap="square"/>
    <!-- Subtle branch cracks -->
    <path d="M 700 200 L 580 220 M 740 600 L 880 620 M 720 1200 L 600 1180 M 800 1800 L 940 1820" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.7"/>
    <!-- Faint shadow inside the crack -->
    <path d="M 700 0 L 720 200 L 680 400 L 740 600 L 700 800 L 760 1000 L 720 1200 L 780 1400 L 740 1600 L 800 1800 L 760 2000 L 800 2400 L 820 2400 L 780 2000 L 820 1800 L 760 1600 L 800 1400 L 740 1200 L 780 1000 L 720 800 L 760 600 L 700 400 L 740 200 L 720 0 Z" fill="#fc1c46" opacity="0.05"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Unglued = coming apart at the seam. A jagged red crack splits the entire cover in half diagonally — a literal fissure through the type and the canvas. The title 'UNGLUED' (540px UPPERCASE weight 500) sits centered, intact on the left, with the crack running through it. Subtle branch cracks radiate from the main fissure. The cover IS the broken thing it describes. Brand 'GLUE' in the bottom-right (ironic); pill 'FISSURE' at the bottom.
